name: Kettlebell Romanian Deadlift
description: Hold one or two kettlebells in front of your thighs. Feet hip-width apart, slight bend in knees. Push your hips straight back while lowering the bells along your legs, keeping your back flat and core braced. Lower until you feel a deep stretch in your hamstrings, then squeeze your glutes to drive back to standing. The KB handles make this easier to grip than a barbell RDL. Can also be done single-leg (suitcase hold) for a balance challenge.
